positive: A mystical bioluminescent forest scene, featuring giant stylized glowing mushrooms and ferns that arch over a gentle woodland stream. The composition should be centered and highly detailed, with strong silhouettes against a deep indigo and emerald green night sky. Magical light sources emit a soft, ethereal glow, highlighting detailed leaf veins and crystalline dew drops. The style is high-contrast neo-fantasy illustration, perfect for an apparel print, emphasizing clean lines and strong visual pop. Cinematic lighting, volumetric fog, rule of thirds composition, vector-graphic quality.
